requirements.task_name: Save three recent beginner Wi‑Fi security articles under 8 minutes to your Reading List
requirements.task_description: Find beginner-friendly Wi‑Fi security posts published from 2023-01-01 onward with estimated reading time of 8 minutes or less, and save the first three matching articles to your Reading List collection.

requirements.task_name: Bookmark the VPN setup guide with more comments from the top two most-commented results
requirements.task_description: Search for VPN setup guides, restrict to how-to content, sort by most commented, compare the top two results by comment count, and bookmark the one with the higher number of comments into the Practice Later collection.

requirements.task_name: Save the password manager review that recommends the most tools to a Research collection
requirements.task_description: Search for password manager reviews, open three relevant articles, identify which one’s first recommendation list contains at least 3 tools and the largest number of tools among the three, and add that article to a collection named Research.

requirements.task_name: Comment on a short, popular phishing article and copy its link
requirements.task_description: Filter phishing articles to those with reading time of 10 minutes or less and at least 10 upvotes, open the top result sorted by shortest reading time, copy its link using the built-in share tool, and post a text comment on the article.

requirements.task_name: Configure weekly on-site OSINT notifications and disable Malware notifications
requirements.task_description: Log in with a provided account, open notification settings, set OSINT topic notifications to weekly on-site alerts, and completely disable notifications for the Malware topic, then save the updated settings.

requirements.task_name: Add a 2024 intermediate CTF write-up with 5+ upvotes to a new Weekend Practice collection and mark it In progress
requirements.task_description: Filter CTF write-ups to intermediate difficulty posts from 2024 with at least 5 upvotes, open the newest matching article, create a Weekend Practice collection, add the article to it, and set its reading status to In progress.

requirements.task_name: Open the first four parts of a Web App Penetration Testing series in separate tabs
requirements.task_description: Navigate to the series directory, locate the most popular Web Application Security series titled Web App Penetration Testing, and open Parts 1–4 of that series in separate browser tabs, starting to read from the Prerequisites section of Part 1.

required_variables.set_condition: After successfully resolving a series whose topic is 'web_application_security' AND whose title (case-insensitive) contains the substring 'web app penetration testing'.
required_variables.reason: Tracks that the user opened the correct Web App Penetration Testing series overview page from the Web Application Security topic.

required_variables.set_condition: When the resolved article belongs to the series recorded in task7_seriesOpened (same series_id) AND its series_part_number is an integer from 1 to 4.
required_variables.value_to_set: Read the current value (or initialize to { "seriesId": article.series_id, "partNumbers": [], "lastUpdatedAt": null }); if article.series_part_number is not already in partNumbers, append it; then set lastUpdatedAt to new Date().toISOString(); save back to localStorage.
required_variables.reason: Records which parts (by part number) of the Web App Penetration Testing series have had their details opened, enabling verification that Parts 1–4 were all viewed.

requirements.task_name: Rate a top Tools article 4 stars and submit detailed feedback
requirements.task_description: Go to the Tools category, open the highest-rated article, give it a 4-star rating, select at least two predefined feedback reasons, and submit a written comment of at least 20 characters through the feedback form.
